summary: Validated AEO+Internal Linking+Citation Tracker mega-batch (backend + frontend). 11/11 internal_linking unit tests pass. 17/17 new API tests pass against public URL (auth, 404, data shape, LLM budget graceful handling). Frontend renders all 3 new panels with correct testids inside PulseSEOWidget; buttons are present/enabled/clickable; previous panels (EeatHistoryPanel, GSCConnectCard) still render. Monochrome editorial design preserved.
critical_code_review_comments: aeo.py and internal_linking.py files are sized reasonably (<450 lines each); no split needed.
internal_linking._inject_links_into_body recomputes protected spans on every entry iteration (O(N*M)). Acceptable for current scale (≤50 posts, ≤500 products), but monitor if corpus grows.

citation_tracker.run loops questions sequentially with per-question timeout 45s — total latency up to ~4–5 min for max_questions=6. Consider asyncio.gather with semaphore for UX speed (low priority; non-blocking since frontend polls/shows spinner).
AEO readiness score: `min(20, avg_qa)` double-counts with `ready_pct` since avg_qa directly reflects FAQ richness — check if intentional weighting.

tests/test_internal_linking.py doesn't need MongoDB; pytest requires .env sourced because deps.py loads MONGO_URL at import time. Non-blocking but worth documenting. Not a regression—shared backend pattern.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (widget + 3 panels + 3 buttons + previous panels all verified, no JS errors)

test_credentials: concepteur@conceptfactory.fr / Concepteur2026! (used for all test flows, site 65964cb0-7a1a-4c11-9644-1ad8f2371d48)
seed_data_creation: None. Only called GET /aeo-readiness and dry_run=true for internal-linking to avoid mutating DB. citation-tracker run test accepts 200/402 (budget graceful).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new endpoints validated: /api/sites/{id}/aeo-readiness (score+7-item checklist), /api/sites/{id}/internal-linking/auto-inject + /stats (deterministic, zero LLM cost), /api/sites/{id}/citation-tracker + /run (402/noop/success all handled). Test site shows AEO score 11/100 due to 0 enriched products — that's expected (products not yet AEO-enriched). Internal linking stats show 0 outgoing links initially. Citation tracker history empty. Frontend testids: aeo-readiness-panel, internal-linking-panel, citation-tracker-panel, aeo-bulk-btn, internal-linking-run, citation-tracker-run.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Implementation is complete and matches the spec.
